about_item: ORTHOPEDIC DOG BEDS - Our pet sofa Features orthopedic memory foam with bolster wall design for added security and calming effect and superior support for your pet's neck & head for ultimate comfort

DURABLE DOG BED - Water-resistant liner and human-grade mattress foam froviding pressure point relief and ensuring long-lasting durability. The wooden floor non-skid bottom adds an extra layer of safety for your pet, particularly for older pets
MODERN DESIGN - Modern dog couch with classy design complementing your home decor while providing optimal comfort for your furry companion

SIZE - Suitable for All Breeds: 28"W x 34"L x 9"D; Sleeping surface: 24"W x 27"L (Large up to 75lbs). Unbox ideally in a well-ventilated area to air out the product from the "new" smell; it may take up to 48-hours for the bed to fully expand

EASY CARE - The water resistant liner keeps bed clean and dry. Removable water resistant bed cover is machine washable; and your purchase is covered by a limited 1-Year warranty, we stand by our promise on quality

summary.text: Customers find the dog bed to be of great quality, comfortable, and spacious enough for multiple dogs, with one noting it has plenty of room to stretch out. The bed receives positive feedback for its soft bolster, easy cleaning, and value for money. While some customers report the bed is durable, others mention it rips easily.

insights.title: Quality
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed to be of great quality.

examples.snippet: Great bed. But our cover ripped, despite the description saying it is anti-rip. I cannot for the life of me find where to order a replacement cover....
...The bed is well made and very sturdy. The only con I’ve found so far is that the dark brown shows everything. Catnip, litter, fur...it shows it all....
I’d say this bed is a hit for our 10 year old golden retriever! Great quality and it seems like it will be easy to clean although we haven’t washed...
What a great dog bed!! Our elderly Catahoula just loves it!!! I am so glad I spent the money to upgrade to this fabulous bed!!

insights.title: Comfort
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed comfortable and enjoy sleeping on it, with one customer noting there's plenty of room to get cozy.

examples.snippet: ...These beds are so awesome. The foam padding is very thick and comfortable. I love that the covers can be taken off and put in the washing machine....
...shell, through old bed in trash and happily placed this nice,clean,comfy to me bed back in the spot my dog rests his bones... he walked over,gave it...
...He is 12 and we believe the memory foam must be very comfortable on his old bones. He has never seemed to enjoy any other bed like he has this one.
...I try out almost anything I give my princess. The bed is super comfy. She's a 70 pound doberman. I bought the extra large, it's a good size for her.

insights.title: Size
insights.summary: Customers appreciate the size of the dog bed, noting it's big enough for German Shepherds and can accommodate two dogs, with plenty of room for pets to stretch out.

examples.snippet: ...wouldn’t be big enough for her since she is long, but it’s the perfect size since she mostly likes to be curled up instead of fully stretched out....
Great size for my 94 lb fella, nice piece of memory foam,I put a piece of masters clothing in it and our friend curled up and took a nape....
The bed is a good size, though we could have bought the XL, and it has comfortable bolsters for our older dog to rest her head on....
...weigh 40 lbs and we thought a medium was the right size but it was too small. We went to a brick and mortar store and got what we wanted.

insights.title: Pet preference
insights.summary: Customers report that their pets love this dog bed, particularly noting that older dogs and puppies enjoy it.

examples.snippet: My dog loves this bed. I think we’ve had it for a month I can tell it will stand up well. The bolsters are nice because it holds the fur in the bed....
Best bed I’ve bought for the price. The dogs love it, they each have their own. But in the picture they’re in an XL. The memory foam is thick....
Dogs love this bed! this is my second, so that guest-dogs have one of their own. Outstanding and best dog bed I've found in ten year of looking.
...I reached out again this am. The bed is awesome, the dog loves it, it's easy to take care of but after three washes it falls apart?...

insights.title: Value for money
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed to be well worth its price, offering great quality for the cost.

examples.snippet: ...dog beds can be a little pricey in general, but this is really worth the money. Since this is my second purchase I would absolutely recommend.
This bed made it onto my “Best Buys” list! It truly is worth every penny, it comes completely apart, all covers can be washed and it looks brand...
This bed is worth the price. It has been perfect for my 17 year old dog who struggles with arthritis, blindness, and pain....
...Bottom line: Great beds. Pricey, yes, but the value is definitely there. Based on what I've seen so far, I would recommend them....

insights.title: Ease of cleaning
insights.summary: Customers find the pet bed easy to clean, as it can be put in the washing machine and is removable for washing.

examples.snippet: Easy to clean? If you only count the cover, sure. The memory foam still holds the smell...a lot of the smell. That is the only hard part to clean.
My babies and I love it. Easy to wash . I have taken pictures So you can see how easy it is to take the stuff out to wash it and to put it back in....
...It is a huge upgrade from the last bed. I looked for a well made, washable, quality product for my aging dog with arthritis and and this bed seems...
...are great, with a waterproof liner, hidden zippers and washable cover. The assembly was super-easy, done by one person in about 5 minutes for each....

insights.title: Softness
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed soft and comfortable, describing it as a super soft bolster with nice padding, and one customer mentions it feels like a mini couch.

examples.snippet: ...It is dense yet soft. My only complaint is the sides. They could be a little higher and a little more supportive. My large dog pushes the sides over....
...To me, the bed feels comfortable and firm, something that was important, since I didn't want to cause her more discomfort when she's stepping around...
Very soft and supportive for my elder dog. Very easy to clean. The plastic that the bed comes in had an odor- aired outside and then washed to remedy.
Super soft and really nice memory foam insert that comes with a removable protective liner (like a pillow protector). My frenchie loves it!...

insights.title: Durability
insights.summary: Customers have mixed opinions about the dog bed's durability, with some finding it durable and saying it should last a long time, while others report that it rips easily and the cover is not durable.

examples.snippet: My dog (and cat) LOVE this bed. It is very sturdy and thick. I added the extra top part bc my dog loves a soft blanket so he can bury himself in it....
...As for quality and packaging, it appears to be well put together and durable. It is pricey but I’m hoping it will last considering the price tag.
Ok the foam mattress itself is fine but the cover did not hold up. All of my other pet beds lasted much longer than this....
Very durable and well made dog bed that provides good support and doesn't flatten. The soft suede cover can easily be removed for cleaning....

authors_reviews.title: Love it so much I just ordered a second one for a different room!
authors_reviews.text: Lucy is a lab/corgi mix, weighs about 45-48 lbs, is roughly 36" long, so I bought the large bed in grey which is a perfect size for her.Words can't express how much Lucy LOVES this bed! She sleeps in it, drags all her toys in it, watches tv in it, and has stopped jumping onto my sofas as much (which was the goal). She definitely prefers this bed to the human furniture. Lucy is turning 8 and so she now requires some additional comfort in life as she approaches her mature years, and also getting some old people issues that prevent her from jumping on and off the sofas anymore. That also means that we've gone through so many beds in the past 8 years that I've realized a few things are important to her:1) She loves pillows, so she needed a bed that had the side bolsters. I've searched and wasted money on SOO many other beds that look fluffy and end up flatting out when she tries to lay on them. I feel like I FINALLY found a bed with real filling that is actually supportive. You can see in the images that they actually hold up against her weight when she rests her head on them. I think this is the #1 reason she loves this bed so much. The arms are real pillows.2) The bed itself had to have true thickness and orthopedic quality to support her weight and back. Corgis tend to be prone to developing back issues late in life, so it's important to me that she have support to prevent these from developing. This mattress is thick and truly orthopedic. She actually prefers this bed now to other furniture and I think that this is the main reason why. She's finally comfortable in her older age. For this reason I just ordered a second one to replace the bedroom doggie bed. She'll now have one in the living room and in the bedroom. Totally worth it!3) Lucy sheds a ton and loves to chew her toys on her beds so it had to be washable and vacuum-friendly. The cover is easy to unzip and slip on and off for washing. Lucy isn't that harsh on her beds so I haven't run into the trouble that some other reviewers have. I also keep a blanket on it for her (as you can see in the pictures), which might also be protecting the cover from wearing down quickly. However, in my honest opinion, even if this cover wears out, that's still worth it to me. The covers aren't that expensive, can be purchased separately, and the bed itself is good quality so I know that it'll definitely last through the next cover. The mattress and bolsters quality is key for me. Additionally, I vacuum it almost daily and it hasn't had any wear and tear signs yet between the washing and vacuuming. I'll provide an update if that changes. I've only had it for about 4 months now, so maybe it's still too new for what others have noted?Finally, I can't speak to the waterproof issue that some others have noted in their reviews. Again, Lucy just sleeps on her beds for the most part, and doesn't ever soil them so I have no idea if it is or isn't waterproof. But, I did follow someone's advice and bought a crib mattress cover to wrap the bottom mattress in before putting it into the vinyl sleeve provided (just in case). Something to consider.In summary, Lucy and I LOVE this bed. The price was honestly a little scary for me at first but after receiving this bed I totally get why it's so pricy. It's definitely a good quality bed, and worth it. It makes her other beds look very shabby and dreadful, honestly, like they should just be tossed. Check out my other reviews to see a competitor that we tried, which was also not cheap but much poorer quality, and is now being trashed and replaced by a second one of these. Can't wait for the second one to arrive for the bedroom. I know Lucy's going to be excited.
authors_reviews.author: Annabelle

authors_reviews.title: So Far So Good - Consider Sizing Down
authors_reviews.text: Update - after two full months of use and daily vacuuming I’m happy to report that this bed is still doing really well. I vacuum it with the pet tool and the hair comes up easily. There are no signs of wear and when our senior Aussie starts licking her paws or legs the bed does get wet but it dries just fine. Both our aussies love the bed and even though the enormous size has been an adjustment it is nice that our tall Aussie shepherd has a place where she can completely stretch out.So far so good.Our Aussies loved their old dog bed, which we purchased because of the good reviews on Amazon. This bed was great but the cover failed - I'm looking at you BarksBar - and even though the bed was great, within a week there were holes in the cover where our girls would sleep. Our girls do not chew or pick. They are senior dogs who just sleep. The BarksBar bed was 40x30.I was worried because this Friends Forever bed measured 44x34 on the outside. I am here to tell you, this bed is HUGE. Both our girls - 71 pounds and 53 pounds can comfortably fit in this bed together and nap. I posted a photo above of the BarksBar bed next to the Friends Forever bed and our 71 pound Aussie is stretched out in the Friends Forever bed. In the BarksBar bed she fit, but her feet hung over the edge or her butt hung out the side. The Friends Forever she fits completely.The Friends Forever bed does have a smell. The memory foam pad that goes in the bottom of the bed smells like a memory foam pad. We have had it in our bedroom for two full days and the smell has dissipated significantly. It did not bother our dogs at all. We turned on a floor fan directly on the bed and the ceiling fan to air the room out and help the bed air out faster. Unfortunately it is snowing like crazy at our house or we would have just put the whole bed outside.I test out every single dog bed that comes into our house because our oldest senior Aussie (pictured above) has degenerative arthritis in her hips and she has a hard time getting comfortable at night. Honestly, I could sleep on the Friends Forever bed. That memory foam is extremely comfortable and it supported my weight of 150 pounds, so I know it supports my girls' weight.I vacuum all the beds in our house every afternoon and then all the covers get washed as needed and every couple months. This bed has been vacuumed twice and the hair come off no problem. I also spray each bed with Odoban to kill any germs and keep the beds smelling good. I will report back after the first washing.
authors_reviews.author: Chicken Nugget

other_countries_reviews.title: Soft, supportive, most importantly - my dog loves it.
other_countries_reviews.text: My dog doesn't like new things, except some toys. He doesn't like it when I clean his crate, or move pillows or blankets around. I was worried that he wouldn't like this bed. He doesn't like it; he loves it.The bed is as advertised - thick memory foam and a good bolster around the side. It's not too soft - just right for him apparently. Maybe the bolsters could be a bit stronger so they don't sag to the side a little bit, but that's nothing. The bed is great and looks great.I got the large for my 55 lbs dog - seems like a perfect fit.
other_countries_reviews.author: WM

other_countries_reviews.title: Happy dog
other_countries_reviews.text: Great product. Easy to wash and my senior dog seems to enjoy laying on it. Would purchase again or recommend.
other_countries_reviews.author: Fenty

other_countries_reviews.title: Comfort for an old man
other_countries_reviews.text: I bought this for my 17 year old Yorkie as he has been experiencing a lot of hip pain and he constantly repositions himself but since the introduction of this bed he seems to be more peaceful and sleeping soundly so I love it.It's nice quality, the memory foam is thick and lush and the small size was perfect for a teacup dog.
other_countries_reviews.author: Hannah

other_countries_reviews.title: Ohne MEMORYSCHAUM
other_countries_reviews.text: HEUTE ANGEKOMMEN SEHR LEICHT; GEÖFFNERT NUR DER BEZUG MIT UMRANDUNG EINE LEERE HÜLLE OHNE DEN MEMORYSCHAUM; DESHALB GLEICH ZURÜCK; ARBEITSAUFWAND DURCH NICHT EINHALTUNG DER BESCHREIBUNG; KORB MIT MEMORYSCHAUM MIT UMRANDUNG UND NICHT NUR EIN BEZUG
other_countries_reviews.author: C. H

other_countries_reviews.title: Mi perrita le encantó
other_countries_reviews.text: Mi perra es "senior" y acaba de ser operada y ella amó esta camita!!En cuanto terminé de armarla, ella sabía que era sólo para ella, estuvo jugando y luego se durmió muy a gusto por horas.Sin duda la mejor espuma viscoelastica para perros que he adquirido, si tu perro no es senior, a la larga va a ayudar a sus articulaciones y un mayor descanso, en caso de tener 7 años en adelante va a agradecer el confort.Además es de gamuza que permite no se acaloren fácilmente a diferencia de otras y es fácil de limpiar con un paño húmedo para manchas superficiales, para suciedad mayor aún no llevo a la lavadora; pero la funda parece resistente.En cuanto a tamaño, la talla chica era muy pequeña para mi perra y está quedó grande; pero le permite jugar y dormir a sus anchas, además se acuesta también otro de mis perros que es mucho más grande de tamaño.Sin duda recomiendo la inversión, tu peludito la va a amar. 🐾💕
other_countries_reviews.author: Cesilia De Santiago
